## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Attention\<\>GrowthX to discuss content strategy, blog performance, and product alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [10 articles published; 15 more coming this week to catch up on backlog](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [New workflow builder feature launching next week; content strategy to align with product roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [SEO audit revealed minor issues (e.g., missing canonical links, internal linking) to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Performance metrics for published articles will be available next week in AirTable](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

## Topics

### Content Publication and Performance

  - [10 articles published using improved V2 workflow](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [15 more articles to be published this week, catching up on backlog](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Performance metrics (clicks, impressions, CTR) to be updated weekly in AirTable](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Minor loading lag issue identified in published articles](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)

### SEO Audit and Improvements

  - [Non-page SEO audit conducted on existing blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Issues found: missing canonical links, suboptimal internal linking, redundant anchors](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Suggestions: add author field, improve CTAs, add conversion panels](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Team to review and implement improvements over time](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [5 articles identified for refresh based on impressions and potential](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Focus on updating stats, metrics, and relevance (many from 2021)](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [8-week tracking period post-refresh to measure performance improvements](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [Current focus: bottom-of-funnel AI/SDR topics + broad sales topics](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Future direction: more futuristic content on revenue orchestration, AI in sales](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Need to align content with product roadmap and upcoming features](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

### New Product Feature: Workflow Builder

  - [Launching next week: allows building workflows around conversational data](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Use cases: enablement content checks, Slack notifications, CRM updates](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Potential for thousands of use cases to be explored in content](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)

### Communication and Collaboration

  - [Team to share new features and use cases via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Weekly discussions to incorporate product updates into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Opportunity to create content ahead of feature launches to build traction](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to send follow-up with Notion doc, meeting recording, and action items](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Attention team to share new features and use cases in Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Implement 15 new articles by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Begin article refreshes for identified posts](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Review and address SEO audit findings over time](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Start aligning future content with product roadmap and upcoming features](https://fathom.video/share/C52u-rwpes6KizmuNLemkPJxQWRkVGY4?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
